{{Quote|The Alliance has reporters, brave men and women who roam from planet to planet, often within Imperial controlled space, collecting stories for dissemination to those willing to see, hear, and understand. Many of these correspondents have companions like A-Cee here, who are equipped to capture, store, and edit whatever they witness. Once the stories have been prepared, they are distributed throughout the Empire via communications relay stations.|Jan Ors|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Candice Ondi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] colonist from [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], serving as an informations officer.

==Biography==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' to [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].</ref> Candice Ondi was a member of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] responsible for making anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] propaganda news reports. Katarn and Ondi felt an attraction toward each other.

She was the original owner of the modified [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[A-Cee]], and herself was equipped with a [[Holocamera/Legends|holocam]].

During the [[Subjugation of Sulon]], she received Morgan's footage from his [[Electrobinoculars/Legends|electrobinoculars]] documenting the assault of commandoes at [[Katarn family compound|his farm]]. Expecting an [[Battle of the G-Tap|Imperial assault]] at the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]], she went there with A-Cee preparing to document everything that would happen, and were joined by Morgan and other Rebels. Candice could see through Morgan's feigned optimism and they exchanged pleasantries, wishing the best for both.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

Morgan and Candice fought together. They witnessed the deaths of [[Jen (Human)|Jen]] and [[Trol]], and Morgan ordered her and other survivors to retreat to the caves, but not before asking from her the services of A-Cee. As they retreated, Morgan narrated to the droid the events that transpired before the assault and covered the droid's departure.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire audio drama">[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>

It was the last time they saw each other, as Morgan retreated while she was covering the story; Candice was mortally wounded when the second [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] arraved, and A-Cee ran towards her. She attempted to say a final word, and died in his arms.

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Candice, is that protocol droid of yours still functioning?|Morgan Katarn, asking about A-Cee|audio=CandiceOndi-DFSftE.flac|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire audio drama" />}}
At the time of her death, Candice Ondi was middle-aged. She had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and large greenish-brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] that Kyle Katarn thought showed her intelligence. He regarded Ondi as pleasant-looking and his father found her physically attractive. The way she removed a piece of lint from Morgan Katarn's shoulder seemed to him like a personal gesture that reminded him of his [[Patricia Katarn|dead wife]].<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

==Equipment==
During business, Ondi wore the makeshift Rebel "uniform" of gray coveralls.<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire" />

==Behind the scenes==
The narration of the ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' gives a tense last meeting between Morgan Katarn and Candice, shortly before the Imperial assault, stating that they never saw each other again, as they both died in that fight. The [[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|audio drama]] however shows that they fought together, until Morgan ordered her to lead others to the caves.
